assessor_1_raw:
## Assessment 1 (Run 2): Sterilization Failure Prediction

Calendar month stratification creates temporal contamination. ROC-AUC selection contradicts AUPRC guidance in same document. Verdict: critique_wins
assessor_2_raw:
## Assessment 2 (Run 2): Sterilization Failure Prediction

Two concrete flaws: temporal contamination via month stratification; ROC-AUC vs. AUPRC internal inconsistency. Held-out machine design is a strength. Verdict: critique_wins
assessor_3_raw:
## Assessment 3 (Run 2): Sterilization Failure Prediction

The design acknowledges AUPRC superiority but uses ROC-AUC for selection — self-contradiction. Calendar month distribution across partitions = temporal mixing. Verdict: critique_wins
adjudication_raw:
## Ensemble Synthesis (Run 2)

Unanimous critique_wins: 3/3.

Verdict: critique_wins
